english: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
All praise is due to Allah, Lord of all the worlds
Glory be to Allah and all praise is His
There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah
Allah is the Greatest
Verily, with hardship comes ease

arabic: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللّٰهِ وَكَفَىٰ بِٱللّٰهِ وَكِيلًا
english: Put your trust in Allah. Allah is sufficient as a Guardian

arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي ٱلْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً
english: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter
Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best Disposer of affairs
I seek forgiveness from Allah, the Magnificent

arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِٱللّٰهِ
english: There is no power nor strength except through Allah

arabic: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللّٰهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
english: Whoever puts their trust in Allah, He will be enough for them

arabic: رَبِّ ٱشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
english: My Lord, expand my chest and ease my task for me
Remember Me, and I will remember you
Indeed, Allah is with those who are patient
And He is with you wherever you are
My Lord, increase me in knowledge
And your Lord will give you, and you will be satisfied
Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest

arabic: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
english: And We are closer to him than his jugular vein
Call upon Me, I will respond to you

arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا ٱسْتَعِينُوا بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَٱلصَّلَاةِ
english: O you who believe, seek help through patience and prayer

arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللّٰهِ وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ وَلَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللّٰهُ وَٱللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ
english: Glory be to Allah, all praise to Allah, there is no god but Allah, Allah is the Greatest
source: The four beloved phrases to Allah

english: Indeed, to Allah we belong and to Him we shall return
